prompts: Cinematic shot in a Japanese fantasy RPG guild strategy room. Eri Dawncrest, an androgynous mage in layered blue robes with floating spell tags, leans over a weathered map on a wooden table. Eri Ashbell, an androgynous frontline adventurer in reinforced leather armor and a guild cloak, stands close by. Dawncrest points at a glowing rune on the parchment, gesturing for Ashbell to inspect the magical trap report. Soft, warm ambient lighting, highly detailed textures, no text, no watermark.

Continuous cinematic shot from the same angle. Eri Ashbell leans forward, placing a gloved finger on the map to trace a tactical path through the Deep Ruins. Eri Dawncrest watches intently, then nods and adjusts a floating spell tag to align with the suggested path. The two exchange a look of professional, cooperative understanding. Consistent character appearance and room lighting, no text, no watermark.
